content.en:
Immeasurable sea of suffering.

When Ye Tian stepped here, he immediately found that the time and space here were very chaotic, as if there were no rules, and the location was constantly changing.

If the time is short, it can be deduced from the location of the entrance, so as to escape into time and space.

But once you go too deep into the immeasurable sea of suffering, or enter some special places, I am afraid that no matter how strong your strength is, it will be difficult to deduce the performance position, and you will be completely lost.

However, Ye Tian didn't care about getting lost, so he moved quickly.

Along the way, even if he found some resources, he didn't bother to collect them, and most of them were of no value to him.

He had only one goal, and that was to find the immeasurable Origin Qi!

Not long after, Ye Tian suddenly broke into a special area while shuttling through.

In this area, time distance seemed to be non-existent, and no matter how much he moved, it seemed impossible to leave this area.

"Trouble, completely lost!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He knew very well that it wasn't that the particular area was huge, but that he hadn't moved much.

He seems to have moved, but the special environment here has even affected his cognition and thinking, he seems to have moved, but in fact he may still be going around in circles somewhere.

If he wants to get out of here successfully, it won't work to travel through time and space or fly, he must break the rules of this place and break the influence of this world on himself to get out of here.

"Even high-level immeasurable lifeforms have been lost in the immeasurable sea of suffering, the probability of my copy body going out is too low, let's just give up this copy body!"

As a result, Ye Tian directly annihilated this replica body.

Subsequently, Ye Tian copied a replica body again, and came to the immeasurable sea of suffering again.

He had to rely on copying his body to find the immeasurable origin qi in the immeasurable sea of suffering again and again, and even if he was unlucky, he would find the immeasurable origin qi someday in the future.

In this way, time passed slowly, and Ye Tian entered the immeasurable sea of suffering again and again, losing a replica body.

"No wonder those great ancestors didn't dare to come here even if they knew that the immeasurable sea of suffering had immeasurable origin qi, and only dared to let a group of cannon fodder try their luck here. If they dare to enter here, they may not be able to get out without luck!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Of course, this also has something to do with the fact that he didn't pay attention at all in the immeasurable sea of suffering, his speed of progress was too fast, if other Great Ancestors came in, he would definitely move forward slowly, and he would not be so reckless when he tested the situation ahead again and again.

But he didn't want to waste his time, so he did this.

......

"Found it!"

Ye Tian was walking in a territory of the Immeasurable Sea of Bitterness, and suddenly sensed a ray of red light floating in front of him in a cloud of mist.

And he had seen the projection of the immeasurable origin qi, so he recognized at a glance that it was a wisp of immeasurable origin qi.

According to the success rate, one wisp of immeasurable origin qi can increase the chance of perfect promotion by two percent, and five wisps of immeasurable origin qi can guarantee 100% perfect promotion.

"This fog is dangerous, let's just drive this fog away!"

Ye Tian shot directly, and the terrifying power was vented, directly shattering the void in front of him.

In a flash.

That cloud of mist was dispersed by Ye Tian's attack, revealing that immeasurable trace of origin qi.

Immediately, Ye Tian stretched out his hand and grabbed this wisp of immeasurable origin qi in his hand, and immediately put it away.

"Go out first, otherwise this replica body will be lost, and the wisp of immeasurable origin qi in your hand will also be lost!"

Immediately, Ye Tian deduced the way back.

It's not that hard for him, after all, he's not lost yet.

After a period of time, Ye Tian successfully came out of the immeasurable sea of suffering, and then gave a wisp of immeasurable origin qi to another copy body of his own.

In the following days, under Ye Tian's repeated searches, wisps of immeasurable origin qi were found by Ye Tian, and he successfully sent out the immeasurable sea of suffering.

"I've already found four wisps of immeasurable origin qi, and I only need to find one more wisp of immeasurable origin qi to impact the realm of middle-level immeasurable life forms!"

Ye Tian thought so.

this day.

Ye Tian was walking in the immeasurable sea of suffering, and suddenly saw a red giant mountain.

"Hey, the red giant mountain, the terrain of the immeasurable bitter sea is almost all sea areas, I have never seen a mountain peak before, but there is such a huge mountain here!"

Ye Tian was curious.

Moreover, this giant mountain is not an ordinary giant mountain, even if it is far away, you can sense the pressure of this giant mountain.

Curious, Ye Tian shuttled over.

As soon as he entered the range of the red giant mountain, the world changed greatly in an instant, and the place he was in at this moment was no longer a red giant mountain, but a red mountain range.

"Oh no, lost again!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Although this loss was a little different from the past loss, he knew very well that he could not get out of this place.

Just as he was about to annihilate the replica body here, he suddenly sensed a powerful aura.

"It's the other lost Great Ancestors!"

Ye Tian guessed.

At this time, he was a little curious, and did not immediately annihilate this body.

Before, he had been lost I don't know how many times, but he had never seen other great ancestors, obviously after being lost, the probability of encountering other great clans was too low.

But this time it seems to be different, and everyone who is lost here seems to be able to sense each other.

"Hahaha, there's another unlucky ghost!"

"It's been a long time since I've been unlucky, and I'm feeling a little bored!"

"Let's go, talk to this newcomer, I don't know what the outside world is like!"

Whoa!!!

In front of Ye Tian, a great ancestor appeared, and all of them were not low in cultivation, they were all in the realm of middle-level immeasurable life forms, and they were extremely terrifying among middle-level immeasurable life forms.

Compared to them, Ye Tian's cultivation was the lowest.

"I've seen all the Great Ancestors!"

Ye Tian greeted politely.

Soon, Ye Tian chatted with this group of Great Ancestors, knowing that they had been here for endless years, when they first came, they were primary-level immeasurable lifeforms, and after they were lost here, they successively broke through to the realm of middle-level immeasurable lifeforms.

Their cultivation strength can continue to improve, but there is no way to leave here.

Of course, they don't have perfect promotions either, just normal promotions.

Moreover, due to the lack of resources, their cultivation speed was very slow, and some of the Great Ancestors were too old in their existence, but they were only more than half of their progress in the realm of middle-level immeasurable life forms.

But soon, Ye Tian knew an astonishing news, there was a high-level immeasurable lifeform here!
